name: RPlog_talk_A_Lone_Marine_Demolition_Team
title: Talk Page: Is This a Roleplay Log?
summary: This is an out-of-character wiki talk page in which editors and players debate how to categorize the associated article, a solo roleplay-monologue Vengan performed during the large space battle over Coruscant. Wiki wranglers Hawke and Xerxes question whether a single-player account even qualifies as an RP log. Mahon recounts how Imperial players initially contested the events, noting that Korolov required alterations, vetoing the implausible bit about surviving being blasted through a Star Destroyer's hull. Vengan finally clarifies the circumstances, explaining that Krieg requested a Marine demolition team for the battle, that his RP partner was sick, and that Krieg, Prospero, and Ansforth vetted and approved his poses before posting.
